entry.title: Re: Yard Logistics: Error while creating new business par...
entry.content:
Hej Ajit, wonderful...the number range in the "normal" BUPA was not defined. The D-number range was missing, that is why the system tried to use another one. Im am so grateful and happy for your explanation! System creates Business Partner with D number range now and it works well! 

Have a great week and thanks for your help. 

Many Greetings, Sandra

entry.title: Re: Hyperlinking by click on a cell in a table in SAC Story
entry.content: Hi, have you managed to create this clickable url functionality (from dimension field)?

entry.title: Entire Asset value adjustment against GL account
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team, 

 

We recently migrated from ECC to S/4 Sep-24 and performed Asset Value adjustment project. 

 

After this activity business received audit feedback for around DIGITS approx. assets that these should not be created as assets in books.   Now we need to adjust these asset value against GL DIGITS balance. 

 

 

 

Thanks & Regards

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Entire Asset value adjustment against GL account
entry.content:
Dear customer, 

about legacy data transfer and how to then adjust the values please see note 3318060. 

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Cancel picking of EWM Production Material Request
entry.content:
Hi Enzo_Faggella , Thank you for clarification! you are right, no such process is there.

We had not exact but similar like left over quantities...We had told user (if do not want to keep for further use) to do manually create task from special WPT to determine the reverse location where it came from via RF  or  also use monitor to select all PSA bins and  configured WPT where Source storage type configured and create WO/WT...

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: Test idea - Status changed to: Delivered
Re: Authorization Error Setting Up SOAP Connection from S...
entry.content: We are on the latest release of Public Cloud. From my understanding, SAP_COM_0316 is used for incoming bank statement files into S4HC. SAP_COM_0256 (scope item 2YM) is being used as a fallback solution for sending bank payment files from S4HC to any recipient. We were informed that it can still be used, although it is no longer actively updated.

entry.title: Re: how to make equipment or FL mandatory on work order i...
entry.content:
Hi ,this is Ayman Aqel from KSA

you can use tcode OIAN to make functional location and equipment field mandatory for the order types you need ,double click on it and add new values

entry.title: I need to add a new custom column in services for object (GOS) in attachments tab in GMGRANT T-code.
entry.content:
I have a client requirement where we need to add a new custom column DOCUMENT TYPE with F4 help to select the document type in Services for Object in attachments tab in GMGRANT T-code. 

Changes should be applied in the Grant Master data module under the GMGRANT T-code.

Please find the attachments for your reference.

Can anyone help me out if it possible to implement this or not?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Background image disappeared in Windows 11
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team, 

Is this issue of Blob Field showing blank images in Crystal Reports Web Viewer with Windows 11 has been solved or not?

if yes then can you please let me know the exact SP version? As of now we are using SP37 and this issue is still there.

entry.title: 採購文件報表的淨訂購值顯示為0
entry.content:
Hi all,

在公有雲版本裡使用「按科目指派顯示採購文件」APP，輸入 WBS 元素作為篩選條件進入報表後，發現「淨訂購值」欄位皆顯示為 0 的情況(如下圖)

但若點選功能表列的「基本清單」，ALV 報表則可正常顯示淨訂購值。

另外，「按供應商顯示採購文件」APP 也同樣有淨訂購值為 0 的問題。

請問淨訂購值為何呈現為0呢? 是否有辦法可以同時看到 WBS 元素和完整顯示的淨訂購值，謝謝

entry.title: Re: Display percentage for a calculated measure in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello @prasanthi_k ,

Thank your for the blog.

I have the same question than mirkue regarding the percentage display in analytic model. How to manage it when we did the calculated measures in the analytic model ?

entry.title: Pension scheme restriction
entry.content:
How can we restrict that one pension scheme is visible for only one employee subgroup.

For example there's a employee subgroup TA - Teachers and we have 5 pension schemes - A1 to A5. But teachers are eligible only for A1, so only A1 pension scheme shd be visible.

How can we restrict this?

entry.title: Re: Flexible workflow PR approval with HR mini master
entry.content:
I had worked on similar requirement recently.

SAP provides a standard Flexible Workflow for Purchase Requisition (PR) approvals, including:

  • WS02000458 – Release of Purchase Requisition Header.

Now, since you need to fetch the approver from the HR Mini Master, here’s how you can approach it:

  1. If the approvers are fixed based on approval limits:

    • You can use Teams & Responsibility Management while configuring the Flexible Workflow in the Fiori app “Manage Workflows for Purchase Requisition.”

    • This way, the approver is determined automatically based on predefined teams and responsibilities.

  2. If the approver needs to be dynamically selected from the HR Mini Master:

    • If the initial approver doesn’t have the required approval limit, the system should escalate the request up the organizational hierarchy.

    • The process continues until it finds a supervisor with sufficient approval authority.

    • To achieve this, you’ll need some custom development to store approval limits and implement the necessary cloud BADIs for different scenarios.

BADI Name

Enhancement Spot

Description

SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_DEF

SWF_PROCESS_WORKFLOW_CONDITION

Providing additional conditions for scenarios.

SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_EVAL

SWF_PROCESS_WORKFLOW_CONDITION

Value evaluation of additional conditions for scenarios.

MMPUR_WORKFLOW_AGENTS_V2

MMPUR_WORKFLOW_AGENTS_V2

Determination of Workflow Agents for Purchasing Documents

#Flexible Workflow#SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement

entry.title: Re: I'M unable to get the error message for this CRAP_WOR...
entry.content:
Kindly refer to

2569105 - API Modules for Work Centers - How to use - SAP for Me
3257161 - Function module CRAP_WORKCENTER_CREATE has no return message - SAP for Me

entry.title: SAP RISE DMO Migration - Storage Migration Server
entry.content:
Hi all,

 

I'm not quite clear about the storage on the migration server and whether we need additional storage there. In the presentation, the storage details for the HANA directories (/hana/shared; /hana/data and /hana/log) are missing. How much memory is available to us there?

And if we realize during the first migration that we need more memory, how quickly could it be made available to us?

entry.title: Plant not appearing while creating new service organization despite maintaining all settings
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Service organization creation issue in S/4HANA Clo... - SAP Community

Referring to SAP note 2696536 & the link to the blog above, we have adhered to the Resolutions of Cause 1 & Cause 2 of the note. This note states that it could be any 1 of the 3 listed causes.

CAUSE 1- You have not assigned a company code to the purchasing organization: This is done. We have only one company code, and one purchasing organization which is assigned to it.

 

CAUSE 2- You have not maintained a standard purchasing organization or sales organization relationship for the plant: This is also done. Here we have listed 14 plants against a common purchase organization. Not sure if this is causing the issue. (Do we need a unique purchase organization for each plant?)

 

CAUSE 3- You have not assigned the sales area to the plant: We are getting to see the plant only after assigning the sales area to a plant. But this setting is required only for intercompany billing (reference link below), which we do not have. Also, using this method, we cannot assign the same plant to different sales areas. But in our projects, we may have to assign the same plant to different sales areas. Hence, I don't think this is the correct approach.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/add-plant-relationship-to-sales-area/qaq-p/12328532

 

But if we do not assign the plant to the sales area (cause 3), we get the error message as below:

Hence, please let us know if this is a system error or whether we are missing some setting.

Thanks & regards,

Pratap.

entry.title: Re: SAP GROUP REPORTING LEARNING
entry.content:
Hello,

It's great you found that SAP Learning Hub link! However, based on the URL you provided, it seems to be a specific project or module within the broader SAP S/4HANA Group Reporting learning materials.

To get comprehensive "A to Z" coverage of SAP S/4HANA Group Reporting, you'll want to explore the full learning paths and resources available through the SAP Learning Hub. Here's a breakdown of how to approach this:

 SAP Learning Hub Access:

Subscription Required: The SAP Learning Hub is a subscription-based service. Ensure you or your organization has an active subscription.
Access the Full Catalog: Once logged in, you'll have access to the entire catalog of SAP learning content.
 Key Learning Areas for S/4HANA Group Reporting:

Look for learning journeys and courses specifically titled "SAP S/4HANA Group Reporting." These are designed to provide end-to-end knowledge.
Focus on these core process areas:
Master Data Configuration: Understanding and setting up consolidation units, consolidation groups, and other master data.
Data Collection and Validation: Learning how to gather financial data from various sources and ensure its accuracy.
Consolidation Processes: Mastering the steps involved in consolidation, including currency translation, intercompany eliminations, and consolidation of investments.
Reporting and Analysis: Exploring the tools and techniques for generating financial reports and analyzing consolidated data.
Configuration and Customization: Understanding how to tailor the system to your specific business requirements.    e-zpassnh com
Search for Relevant Courses:
Use keywords like "SAP S/4HANA Group Reporting configuration," "SAP S/4HANA Group Reporting consolidation," and "SAP S/4HANA Group Reporting reporting" within the Learning Hub search.
Look for learning maps relating to financial consolidation.

Best Regards

entry.title: SAP RE-FX intercompany lease ?
entry.content:
Case description : 

Company A owns offices that is rented partially by another company in the group. I don't know if this scenario is supported and integrated in RE-FX. I don't see it in the documentation.

I guess it can be achieved using CO modules (with statiscal key figures for example) but it would requires a bit of specific for the finance part compliance (using RRICB with an adaption of BADI).

Process was cancelled right away after completing personal data collection, the process status was open.

 

BR,

Lukasz

entry.title: Re: We need the provision for FB01 & F-48
entry.content:
Dear user,

And thank you for providing more details.

To post a journal entry using a BP reference as Customer, you can use the Post Incoming Payments app as mentioned in my previous answer.

This application allows you to post a journal entry on a Customer versus Customer, Customer versus Supplier and even Customer versus G/L account if needed.

Customer vs Customer :

Customer vs Supplier :

Customer vs G/L account :

I hope this will help you with solving your issue.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: How to delete or Change MIC version
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

Is it possible to delete MIC version. For example i have a MIC with two versions. Both versions were created on the same day.

Now i want to delete the version 2 of MIC. Is it possible?

Thanks in advance.

Warm regards

entry.title: reporting on successfactor business rules and the respective assignments - workflow / HRIS element
entry.content:
hi 

I am doing a review of a clients business rules, workflows &  alerts etc. I need to be able to report on the workflow config and trace back to which business rule triggers the workflow. When I look under Configure business rules, there are some rules that are not assigned ( which i would have assumed that it means that they are not in use even though they are not end dated) , however when i look in Business Configuration and look at the HRIS element, I can see that the Business rule is assigned and has a "Yes" under enabled . I understand that some business rules may not be associated with a workflow. But surely if the business rule is associated with an HRIS element or something else, I should be able to see an assignment green tick under the Configure business rules? Is this an incorrect assumption ? How then do i accuratelyy report on the active and in use business rules

I did pull an export from Configure business rules, and a significant number came back with the comment that no assignment details could be found ( maybe because the rules were created under the basic rule sceanario). Not really sure.

entry.title: Re: Show the ID of measures even though it has a descript...
entry.content:
Hi Ivan,

thanks for your answer. It helps a little bit to identify the measures. The problem is you can not search for the ID anymore. So in your instance you wouldn't be able to find the measure if you search for measure1. I was kinda hoping there would be an option to switch to the ID in the builder menue. In some of my cases the description of two measures or even more would be the same and the only way to distinguish them would be by hovering over them. However i am starting to accept that this is the only solution.

Thank you again for your answer!

Have a nice day
Stefan

entry.title: Hi all, I have a problem with that solution in transaction notification of SAP B1 HANA
entry.content: @U_VG_USER_WHS" and in there I have created two UDF "U_VG_User" and the next one is "U_VG_WhsCode". In "U_VG_User", I will provide SAP user name, and in "U_VG_WhsCode". So, for example, I will add named "alex" value in "U_VG_User" and with "04" warehouse code in "U_VG_WhsCode". Based on these facts, I want a vaildation that in Inventory Transfer(OWTR), if the sap user alex (according to example from mapping) wants to add 04 warehouse (according to example from mapping) into "From Warehouse field named "Filler" in OWTR, it should not be added with 04 and show error message. I want to prevent this SAP user adding that restricted warehouse code according to UDT mapping into "Filler" field of OWTR". I want to write this in transaction notification.

entry.content:

i am preparing a mockup Story for a client and one requirement is to filter for subsidiary, location and 

accounting area now i have tried this with an input filter wich should work but if i choose one subsidiary the filter does not work for some of them see attached picture.

The three filter options are in a hierarchy going as follows.
1 subsidiary --> 2 location --> 3 accounting area --> 4 Debtor

 



Kind Regards and Thanks for your help
Paul

certbot certonly --manual --csr ./junjuncsr.pem --preferred-challenges dns

.

Best Regards!

Jacky Liu

entry.title: Image of type as Blob Field not displaying in CR Web Viewer particularly with OS Windows 11
entry.content:
Hi,

We have recently upgraded our machines to Windows 11 and observed that blob fields are showing blank in CR Web view (ASP.NET). When we inspect web page and check then there is no file not found error and same image is available at physical path but completely blank. refer -

Please help us to solve this issue asap. FYI - We are using SP37 of both SAP Crystal Reports for Microsoft Visual Studio & runtime engine for .NET Framework (32 bit).

entry.title: Staging for production in REM in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm executing scope item BJH in SAP Public cloud. The issue I have is in the step of staging the components for production; no requirement/ quantities for staging are displayed in the Pull list: storage location Level.

Prerequisite are done: assignment of the REM profile 0002 to the finished product, assignment  of bin to PSA, controle cycle creation with Staging Indicator 5 EWM Staging for components.

PS: the storage location is warehouse managed 

Do you any ideas what could be missing and is EWM staging with REM even supportd  in SAP S/4 Public Cloud ?

entry.title: Re: Hello we have problems with Office Key user in CG54
entry.content:
Hi C.B.

Just a hunch: did you perhaps run an auth trace? Not sure what changed and when, but it seems that C_SHER_TD2 with ACTVT = 03 is required.

Jan

entry.title: Re: unable to drill down in a Crystal report chart
entry.content: the database client on the new server is ever so slightly different (a more recent version of SQL server native client driver), but that shouldn't be an issue once the data is refreshed and in the report, surely

entry.title: Re: Manually Editing the Amount in Settlement Document| S...
entry.content: Hi, I have a question. How can we use REV1 if we created the condition contract table 163. Its specified per material. How do we calculate the REV 1?

entry.title: Re: Namespaces are not supported for this language versio...
entry.content:
After implementing SAP Note 3489660,(Enable deployment into UI5 ABAP Repository with language version "ABAP for Cloud Development" using development namespaces) the issue is resolved.

If anyone know if all customers who install our partner add-on also need to implement this note please let me know.

 

 

__PRESENT

entry.title: Re: Error program EHS_WWI LABEL not registered
entry.content: It might also be worth checking for error messages dev_rfc.trc

entry.title: Able to revoke the Service Entry Sheet even though the Credit Memo is not approved yet
entry.content:
Need your advise/confirmation if it is the right expected behavior to revoke SES to edit the quantity.

During the approval process the Credit Memo can be rejected or deleted, but already revoked SES - doesn't seem right.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Able to revoke the Service Entry Sheet even though th...
entry.content:
System does not consider the credit memo status whether its approved or rejected, rather checks the PO history of the reference PO item for the presence of invoice documents.

So once credit memo is created the reference is removed and amount is nullified thus system allows the SES to be revoked. Thus in standard system we don't throw any error  in SES while revoking if credit memo is not yet approved.

Also you can edit the SES and reduce quantity and submit again and  then create new credit memo for the difference amount.

 Ideally procedure is given below:

  1.  Approve the credit memo and revoke the SES
  2.  Edit the SES and Submit with correct quantity
  3.  Create new invoice with correct quantity

 

  • Note: You may ask your developers to  raise  error in SES while revoking if the credit memo is not approved yet.
  • Also consider search and Vote or post new ideas or missing functionalities in customer influence forum

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2838428

 Refer below KBA for useful details in this context

3255842 - Unable to revoke Service Entry Sheet - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: Questionmark cannot launch sample exam / I s this the...
entry.content:
Hi @julie_jamieson2 
Which FAQ link is not working for you?
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: What is the quickest way to transfer data from an on-premise SAP ECC system to SAP BTP?
entry.content: we have a few applications built in ABAP RAP running on SAP BTP environment. These apps need to access some real time data on our SAP ECC on-premise system. I want to understand what is the best and the fastest way which brings good performance. Should we use OData to fetch the data or should we use RFC to fetch the data. Based on my search on the internet it seems that RFC is much faster than OData. Has anyone tried both of them and has found one better over the other?

entry.title: Re: Unable to Create Cross-Company Code Purchasing across...
entry.content:
So you followed Cross-Company Purchasing Organization (2R3) for you region, but I have some doubt for inter-country validity?

  • 'Central Purchasing Orgs must be confined to one country' was a constraint?

entry.title: To include project summary information up to 100 words, a new box must be added to the Grants Master
entry.content:
We have a client requirement to add a custom field to be added to the Grants Master data module, ideally under the General Data tab with the title: Project Summary (max. 100 words) which allows to write text up to 100 words.

Please find the screenshot for reference.

We have enhanced GMGRANT T-code with new custom fields using BDT. Here we have to add a new custom field which is capable to store maximum of 100 words.

But we have data element which will be able to hold only up to CHAR 255.We tried using string, but it is not working.

And also, we need to enhance the screen with a box which will hold max 100 words.

Can anyone help on this if it is possible or not?

Thanks in advance.

You already have the app My Inbox to manage the tasks, in my humble opinion SAP Start is the best option.

 

Best Regards.

entry.title: SAP GTS QUESTION
entry.content: I have created 100 sales orders in feeder system, but only 90 sales orders transferred to SAP GTS data are same like customer and material. What could be the reason?

entry.title: Individual purchase requisitons from a single sales order
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working on a procure-to-order scenario (individual purchase order) with item category group: BANC, item category: TAB, and schedule line category: CB. When I save the sales order, the system generates a single purchase requisition containing multiple line items corresponding to the sales order lines.

What is the configuration tbd so the system, will create different PRs when saving the sales order.

entry.title: Re: CREATE_DEEP_ENTITY using RAP ( Unmanaged )

entry.title: Serial number already locked by the user in Production order
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

When generating serial numbers using the newly created serial number in the production order, I encounter an error stating that the serial number is already locked by a user. However, upon checking in SM12, there are no lock entries for any user.

Regardless of the quantity of serials being generated, the system continues to display this error. Could you please advise on how to resolve this issue?

entry.title: Problems with USING ALL CLIENTS
entry.content:
Dear SAP-Community

I have an abap-sql, that selects data on two clients (100 and 700). Some data is in client 100 and some other in client 700.
With the old known CLIENT SPECIFIED a SELECT with CLIENT is possible. 

The following code functions, but returns a warning saying I should use USING ALL CLIENTS instead of client specified:


lv_mandt_100 = '100'.
lv_mandt_700 = '700'.

SELECT
FROM ekko AS ekko_100
LEFT OUTER JOIN t024 AS t024_100
   ON
    t024_100~mandt = @LV_mandt_100 AND
     t024_100~ekgrp = ekko_100~ekgrp
LEFT OUTER JOIN ekko AS ekko_700
   ON
       ekko_700~mandt = @LV_mandt_700 AND
       ekko_100~mandt = @LV_mandt_100 AND
       ekko_100~externalreferenceid = ekko_700~ebeln
  LEFT OUTER JOIN ekpo AS ekpo_100
     ON
       ekko_100~mandt = @LV_mandt_100 AND
       ekpo_100~mandt = @LV_mandt_100 AND
       ekko_100~ebeln = ekpo_100~ebeln
  CLIENT SPECIFIED
FIELDS
  ekko_100~ebeln AS ebeln_100,
  ekko_100~ekgrp AS ekgrp_100,
  t024_100~eknam AS eknam_100,
  ekko_700~ebeln AS ebeln_700,
  ekpo_100~ebelp AS ebelp_100,
  ekpo_100~konnr AS ekpo_100_konnr,
  ekpo_100~txz01 AS ekpo_100_txz01
WHERE
  ekko_100~mandt      = @LV_mandt_100
ORDER BY
  ekko_100~ebeln,
  ekpo_100~ebelp
INTO TABLE @DATA(mt_output)
BYPASSING BUFFER.

 

If I replace the CLIENT SPECIFIED with USING ALL CLIENTS I get an error, that I am not allowed to use field "MANDT" in an ON-constraint.

lv_mandt_100 = '100'.
lv_mandt_700 = '700'.

SELECT
FROM ekko AS ekko_100
LEFT OUTER JOIN t024 AS t024_100
   ON
     t024_100~mandt = @LV_mandt_100 AND
     t024_100~ekgrp = ekko_100~ekgrp
LEFT OUTER JOIN ekko AS ekko_700
   ON
       ekko_700~mandt = @LV_mandt_700 AND
       ekko_100~mandt = @LV_mandt_100 AND
       ekko_100~externalreferenceid = ekko_700~ebeln

  LEFT OUTER JOIN ekpo AS ekpo_100
     ON
       ekko_100~mandt = @LV_mandt_100 AND
       ekpo_100~mandt = @LV_mandt_100 AND
       ekko_100~ebeln = ekpo_100~ebeln
  USING ALL CLIENTS "<- instead of CLIENT SPECIFIED belongig to the warning
FIELDS
  ekko_100~ebeln AS ebeln_100,
  ekko_100~ekgrp AS ekgrp_100,
  t024_100~eknam AS eknam_100,
  ekko_700~ebeln AS ebeln_700,
  ekpo_100~ebelp AS ebelp_100,
  ekpo_100~konnr AS ekpo_100_konnr,
  ekpo_100~txz01 AS ekpo_100_txz01
WHERE
  ekko_100~mandt      = @LV_mandt_100
ORDER BY
  ekko_100~ebeln,
  ekpo_100~ebelp
INTO TABLE @DATA(mt_output)
BYPASSING BUFFER.

Documentation for USING ALL CLIENTS is here: https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_latest_index_htm/latest/en-US/abapselect_client.htm 

Belongig the documentation it's not possible to use USING ALL CLIENTS for a single join. But in the above code I use it for the whole FROM/JOIN.

So, my question is, how should I change the abap code to use USING ALL CLIENTS instead of CLIENT SPECIFIED?

And my other question is, if I use the CLIENT SPECIFIED, will the code in future not function anymore?

Best regards
Lorenzo

entry.title: Re: Unable to Create Cross-Company Code Purchasing across...
entry.content: No Sir, I don't want to be confined to one country.

entry.title: Re: Download formatted open items list AR/AP excel
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

In the Manage Customer Line Items app within S4 Hana Cloud Public Edition, you can export data to an Excel file using the built-in export functionality.

However, the app does not provide options to customize the format of the exported Excel file directly.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Extending view S1 on fiori app breaks model in extension project
entry.content: You shared both the Component and the manifest but still not the controller. Also, please share code as text and not as image.

entry.title: BADI alternatives for various Sales and Distribution(SD) related Processes/Transactions if any
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

As evident from the subject we are looking for BADI alternatives for various Sales and Distribution(SD) related Processes/Transactions, preferably Cloud compatible. In the nutshell we are seeking guidance on alternatives for SAP-World famous EXITS like MV45AFZZ, MV50AFZ1, RV60AFZZ etc. if any.

I have seen many related questions on this like Sales Order Creation - BAdi for S/4HANA Public Cloud where they are suggesting to use SD_SLS* related BADIs like SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD, SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM etc. But these BADIs are Custom Fields and Logic specific meaning they are only for manipulating the fields added using Custom Fields Extensions and hence only those fields are available as CHANGING parameter,

I have tried my level best searching inside the Enhancement Spot ES_SD_SLS_EXTEND for this but couldn't come up with anything fruitful. 

Hence, requesting suggestions here from all gurus on this, or if nothing is available yet does that mean we are still good to use those above mentioned Godfather USER-EXITS 😉 and stick with Tier3 Extensions for such scenarios?

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: Service groups of MDI Product does not appear in /IWFND/V4_ADMIN tcode
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am doing setup instructions for MDI using that https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/d761beaeedd949c18213f449f4617250/32afd67be8dc4e66890171e9924098f6.html?locale=en-US&q=master+data+integration. 
In our scenario we are trying to do replicate product master data S/4HANA to Public Cloud system. So I want to prepare our S/4HANA system as provider. On "Publish OData V4 Service Groups" part there are some services and service groups for MDO and MDI. When I opened the /IWFND/V4_ADMIN tcode, left side of the screen shows us published service groups. I did not see any of the service groups. Then I think I need to publish them. I pressed "Publish Service Groups" button and searched as follows. 

I came across the following pop-up.

Is there anything to do for seeing that service groups in the /IWFND/V4_ADMIN tcode. Or is there a step I'm doing wrong?

Thanks in advance for any input.

Berk.

Thanking you .

Mohammed

I look forward to hearing from you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Story Report in SuccessFactors- I am trying to get co...
entry.content:
Sorry, but it's really hard to understand why are you strugelling that long with a pretty simple report set-up. We don't have any screenshots from you, therefore it's almost impossible to validate what you are doing and give you a precise advice. Here is an example of how I would do similar report:

Create these 2 measures:

then create a table (I don't have values for weight as it's not in my Goal plan):

entry.title: Re: I would like to know how to obtain SOC1 and SOC2 repo...
entry.content:
Hi,

thank you for the details provided.

Please visit 'SAP Trust Center --> Compliance --> Compliance Finder' related to your request:

- SOC1:

https://www.sap.com/about/trust-center/certification-compliance/compliance-finder.html?sort=latest_desc&search=soc

https://www.sap.com/about/trust-center/certification-compliance/compliance-finder.html?sort=latest_desc&tag=compliance-document:compliance-offering/soc-1-bridge-letter

- SOC2:

https://www.sap.com/about/trust-center/certification-compliance/compliance-finder.html?sort=latest_desc&tag=compliance-document:compliance-offering/soc-2

https://www.sap.com/about/trust-center/certification-compliance/compliance-finder.html?sort=latest_desc&tag=compliance-document:compliance-offering/soc-2-bridge-letter

Here you can search for the SOC1 and SOC2 reports, read its details and act accordingly.

SAP Support  - including component CA-AUD - does not deal with SOC reports or any other compliance-related issues, please contact the Compliance Department (links above) in case of any additional questions.

Thank you and have a nice day,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Hi Guru's Help me on periodic billing plan Item net v...
entry.content:
Business wants  to show item net value and billing plan must be same

Not sure what is the issue currently you have or what configuration is set.  Based on your above comments, I presume, you wanted to see same value as billing plan value and net value in which case, try setting "N" as Calculation type to your pricing condition and test

Sara

Best regards Sascha

entry.title: Transfer posted values from asset to GL account as per auditors
entry.content:
Hi Members, 

We need to transfer complete asset impact to GL(Contra Account) from last 4 years for few assets, this include previous accum dep (Asset values uploaded while value allocation project legacy values as legacy data in last closed FY ), current year dep . (Normal Dep Calculation). 

Need to understand steps and transaction needs to be executed to accomplish the said task. 

 

Thanks & Regards 

S

entry.title: Re: CDC - Other consent statement (not mandatory) is beco...
entry.content:
Hello @arunaruva,

Let me share my knowledge about this topic. If you still have questions after reading this, please don't hesitate to ask in the comments.

In the Customer Data Cloud, Consents may be:
1) Required (Mandatory) / Not required (Not mandatory)
If Consent is required, it means only true values are acceptable for the user to become fully registered.
If Consent is not required, it means both true and false values are acceptable for the user to become fully registered.
2) Active / Not active
If Consent is active, it means the Consent has to be presented to the end user ().
If Consent is not active, it means the Consents shouldn't be presented to the end user.

Let's review your case: Not required (not mandatory) active Consent.
In your case, the Consent has to be presented to the end user, but may not be selected/accepted (false value is acceptable) to become a fully registered user. But it is still required from a schema point of view, because it's active and CDC expects to get a value (true or false).

When you tried to map the Consent to isConsentGranted and make it not required for the current screen, CDC understood it as there is at least one screen where this Consent may be not presented to the end user. That's why the system automatically tried to change this Consent from Active to Inactive.

Hope the explanation was clear and helped shed some light on it.
Regards,
Oleh.

entry.title: Re: How to Connect CAPM With Integration Suite ?

entry.title: Re: procedure for the BAPI/FM to change the equipment bom...
entry.content: Did you already perform some search on CSAI_BOM_MAINTAIN?

entry.title: Re: reporting on successfactor business rules and the res...
entry.content:
Hi @tendisachamis 

Please check this KBA -2778212 - "Assigned" field is empty in Configure Business Rules page

As detailed there, if the rule is under basic scenario, the assigned field will be empty (with no green tick), even though the rule is actually assigned. The assignment is only shown for rules under application-specific scenarios.

Hope this helps.


Iulia

entry.title: New Expert-Guided Implementation: Exploring SAP SuccessFactors HCM Generative AI
entry.content:
"The trainer was knowledgeable and had an excellent understanding of the subject. Very patient and willing to interact with attendees." 

"It was great to have support while working through the tasks. I got a lot more out of it than just watching a presentation." 

These are just some of the experiences shared by participants in our Expert-guided Implementation (EGI) sessions. Now, you have the opportunity to experience it for yourself with our latest offering: "All You Need to Know about SAP SuccessFactors HCM Generative AI." 

This hands-on, two-day remote workshop is designed to help you unlock the full potential of Generative AI within SAP SuccessFactors. And the best part? SAP Enterprise Support Academy is included with every SAP cloud subscription, providing valuable learning resources at no additional cost. 

What is an EGI? 

An EGI is an interactive, multi-day training that combines expert-led instruction with practical application. Here’s how it works: 

  • An SAP expert guides you through key tasks step by step. 
  • You apply what you've learned in your own SAP environment, with the expert available for support. 

This structured approach ensures you gain both theoretical knowledge and hands-on experience, helping you build confidence in using SAP solutions effectively. 

Prerequisites 

To participate in this session, ensure the following prerequisites are met: 

  • Your tenant is located at the supported data centers as per SuccessFactors Generative AI Availability. 
  • You have completed the purchase and provisioning for the necessary SKU (8016532) and AI Units, and have signed the Terms & Conditions. 
  • You have already implemented the corresponding modules for the Premium AI use cases you intend to activate. 

Agenda 

Topics covered include: 

  • Understanding the benefits and capabilities of Generative AI in SAP SuccessFactors.

  • Validating requirements and ensuring customer readiness for Premium AI Activation.

  • Walking through practical use cases, capabilities, and setup steps.

  • Tips for monitoring AI Unit consumption and troubleshooting common issues (e.g., permission errors).

  • Guided steps to enabling Generative AI in your demo instances for the following use cases:

    • AI-Assisted Writing for 360 Reviews
    • AI-Assisted Goals
    • AI-Assisted Job Descriptions in Recruiting
    • AI-Assisted Skills Matcher
    • AI-Assisted Job Recommendations (CSB)
    • AI-Assisted Interview Insights (Prerequisite: Teams App for SAP)
    • AI-Assisted Career Insights
    • AI-Assisted Person Insights for Compensation Discussions

Download the Summary Document for this session.

How to Register 

Check the latest schedule and secure your spot: 

  • Upcoming session: 
Day 1 : Monday 28/04/202511:00 AM - 01:00 PM (New York)
Day 2 : Tuesday 29/04/202511:00 AM - 01:00 PM (New York)
  • Registration closes one week before the session date - sign up early! 
  • Sessions require a minimum number of participants to take place. 
  • Once registered, you'll receive a confirmation email with dial-in details sent to your S-User email. 

Register Now

This Expert-Guided Implementation (EGI) is brought to you by the SAP Enterprise Support Academy. Before you can access the registration links, a one-time registration in SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support, is required. A detailed step-by step guide to registration can be found here.** 

 Enhance Your SAP Experience with Value Maps 

Beyond EGI sessions, SAP Enterprise Support offers additional resources to help you drive innovation. SAP Enterprise Support value maps provide expert-led resources, tailored recommendations, and advisory services - all included in your SAP cloud subscription. Get started today: 

  • One-time sign up for SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support, using a valid S-User ID (please allow up to 2 hours for processing) 
  • Access SAP Enterprise Support value maps for personalized guidance 
  • Request a call with our solution area experts for tailored advice 

Value Maps are part of SAP Enterprise Support’s commitment to your success. Visit the SAP Enterprise Support value maps landing page to explore our range of topics and start engaging with us today. 

 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 

About the author: 

  • Alejandro Azcarate is a Global Topic Owner for SAP Enterprise Support value maps, specializing in SAP SuccessFactors HCM. Based in Madrid, Spain, Alejandro has been with SAP since 2007, holding various roles across the organization. Today, he focuses on helping businesses navigate HR transformation through SAP Enterprise Support offerings.  

Have questions, comments or feedback? Don't hesitate to comment down below or contact  
@alejandroazca

entry.title: Re: CREATE_DEEP_ENTITY using RAP ( Unmanaged )
entry.content:
Hello @Tisha_Haria and @Ramya_Priya,

For the deep create method there are three returned entities,

to get the response in case of success use the mapped entity as follow:

wa_order_ord = VALUE #(
                                %key                  =  <fs>-%key
                                production_order      =  <fs>-%key
                                ).

APPEND wa_order_ord TO mapped-_order.

        loop at it_result assigning FIELD-SYMBOL(<hu_s>).

          wa_order_ser-hu = <hu_s>-hu.
          APPEND wa_order_ser TO mapped-_serial.
        endloop.

if the issue is in accessing the components themselves then its in the blog's code where the header and items are assigned separately then handled as needed :

    DATA(lv_import) = order.     " Header entity
    DATA(lv_import_sr) = serial. " Item entity
    LOOP AT lv_import_sr ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<sr>) .
          LOOP AT <sr>-%target ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<tr>).

            wa_order_ser = VALUE #(
                         %key-production_order =   lv_ord_no
                         %key-serial           =   <tr>-serial
                         production_order      =   lv_ord_no
          ).

            wa_report_ser = VALUE #(
                          %key-production_order =   lv_ord_no
                          %key-serial           =   <tr>-serial
                          production_order      =   lv_ord_no
            ).

            wa_fail_ser = VALUE #(
                        %key-production_order =   lv_ord_no
                        %key-serial           =   <tr>-serial
                        production_order      =   lv_ord_no
             ).


            "insert code for items handling
            

          ENDLOOP.


        ENDLOOP.

Please let me know if that covers the issue you are facing or if further details are needed

entry.title: How to make Maximum Stacking Factor field visible in the material master in SAP ECC?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Greetings!

I need help for enabling the Maximum stacking factor (MARM-MAX_STACK) field in the material master in ECC. I have already checked the relevant field selection group 135 in which all the field references are set as 'optional entry'  (except for MM03 and MMVD which are set to 'display'). However, the the max. stacking factor is invisible in the material master. So, what is the way to make it visible?

Thank you

entry.title: Automatic Sales Price Calculation using Pricing Worklist in S/4HANA Retail
entry.content:
Business Scenario:

Retail clients heavily rely on the selling price of articles as a key factor in their business success. Various elements, including article cost, profit margins, and market conditions, influence the final selling price, therefore accurate calculation of the selling price considering all the key factors is crucial for maintaining competitiveness, ensuring profitability, and meeting customer expectations.

Problem Statement:

The purchase price is a crucial factor in determining the final selling price, but it often fluctuates due to varying supplier agreements and market conditions. Keeping track of these frequent changes and promptly adjusting the sales price accordingly can be challenging. Ensuring that final selling price reflects the latest purchase costs requires a systematic approach which can automatically consider such changes to accurately calculate new selling price and remain competitive in the market.

Solution:

If the purchase price or the parameters for source determination changes, it is advisable to check the existing sales prices with respect to the new margin and perform a new sales price calculation. The pricing worklist is used to perform new calculations for certain articles and the relevant organizational levels, this is only possible if their sales price calculation(s) is (are) affected by pricing-relevant changes. This is flagged by a change pointer or a document index.

Pricing Worklist is a functionality used to manage and streamline the pricing process by tracking and processing price changes efficiently. It helps retailers maintain up-to-date sales prices by capturing changes triggered by factors such as purchase price fluctuations and automatically determining all previous calculations affected by the changes. This enables you to perform new sales price calculations considering all the changes.

Pre-requisite, Configuration and Step by Step process to use Pricing worklist for Sales Price Calculation in S/4HANA

Sales prices are generally calculated on the basis of the purchase price, which is in turn calculated using the purchase price calculation schema on the basis of condition types affecting pricing (the basic purchase price, vendor discount, for example). Other pricing-relevant parameters including the regular vendor  indicator in the purchase info record and the source of supply indicator in the article master data are evaluated in supply source determination.

If you want to use the pricing worklist function, you must make sure that when you save a sales price a pricing document is created with a document index. This setting is made under Pricing type.

  • Pricing documents with adjustments for changes in conditions:

    This document index determines only those calculations affected by a change in purchase price.

  • Pricing documents with adjustments for changes in conditions and master data:

    With this document index, calculations that are affected by changes to the source of supply parameters are entered, in addition to those affected by changes in purchase prices.

The entries in tables S111 and WIND are controlled using filters. These filters are Customizing table.

Prerequisite: 

The prerequisite for creating change pointers for the pricing worklist is that there’s an initial pricing document (table WKBP) in the system for a new article, because the last pricing document is used to determine the calculation settings (e.g. purchase- and sales price determination sequence) when the articles are re-calculated using the pricing worklist function.

Configuration:

1. First, you activate the direct entry for creating the worklist for document category 10 (Pricing: Pricing worklist). IMG: → Logistics General → Retail Pricing → Pricing Worklist → Direct Entry for Creating Worklist → Activation of the Direct Entry for Creating the Worklist

(You can also use Program: RMEBEMIG to set direct entry indicator for Pricing)

2. Then, table T6I2A determines the scope of changes for direct entry into the worklist: IMG: → Logistics General → Retail Pricing → Pricing Worklist → Direct Entry for Creating Worklist → Define the Scope of Change for Direct Entry in Worklist.

3. Table T6I1 contains the condition types and corresponding condition tables that are to be checked for changes: IMG: → Logistics General → Retail Pricing → Pricing Worklist → Control Automatic Document Adjustment → Control Pricing Document Adjustment for External / Internal Procurement.

So this means that the system creates the entries for condition-related changes, which are relevant for the pricing worklist, in the WIND — Document Index: Conditions for Automatic Document Adjustment table.

The pricing worklist is used to create a list of newly performed calculations in the form of pricing documents. This includes all calculations affected by the changes and their validity periods. A comparison is made between the entries in table S111 and those in table WIND via field VARKEY.

Procedure:

1. Create a buffer of data out of the changed parameters (known simply as a "worklist") which forms the basis for generating the pricing worklist.

You do not have to perform this Customizing activity if you have made the settings for the direct entries in the worklist for condition changes in Retail Pricing (document category 10) under Logistics - General  Retail Basic Data Activation of the Direct Entry for Creating the Worklist.

2. Generate the pricing worklist from the worklist of price calculations you wish to update. (T-code: WVN0)

3. When a change is made to the master data concerned in the pricing worklist function (regular vendor indicator and vendor subrange in the info record, source of supply indicator in the article master), you no longer have to perform IMG activities 1 and 2. This is because when the master data change is saved, the pricing that is affected by this is determined at the same time and the appropriate entries are created in the pricing worklist.

4. Process the pricing worklist for specific articles and organizational units. (T-code: WVN1/WVN2)

5. The new prices that are calculated are stored, as before, in pricing documents. You can change the results by setting certain parameters, such as the article markup rate, the margin, the sales price or the final price.

6. Save new sales prices that you are happy with and delete any price calculations that you do not want.

entry.title: Re: Ariba Guided Buying : PO creation in quality environment
entry.content: Hi thanks for your reply.I guess my question was not clear enough.
